## Professional Profile

**Education:** BS Computer Science, University of California San Diego (Jacobs School of Engineering). Expected June 2026. GPA: 3.7.

**Incoming Role:** Software Engineer at Intuit (June 2026)

**Experience:**
- Software Engineer Intern at Intuit (June–Sep 2025). Reduced costs 80% via Kafka migration; integrated third-party bank vendor REST APIs serving 100+ internal teams.
- Software Development & Research Intern at Salk Institute (June–Sep 2024). Built GPU-accelerated bioinformatics pipeline achieving 30× speedup on genome analysis.
- Instructional Assistant at UC San Diego CSE Dept. Taught across three semesters.

## Projects

**Spotify Translator** — Python, PyPi. Real-time Spotify lyric translation and transcription tool. https://pypi.org/project/spotify-translator/

**Based Math Game** — React, Firebase. Competitive speed quiz-style math game with leaderboards. https://basedmathgame.com
